login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: Access your library, pick up where you left off, and join the community.
login.rememberSession: Keep session active on this device
login.invalidCredentials: Incorrect e-mail or password. Try the demo credentials below.
login.redirectInfo: After signing in, you will be redirected to the page you tried to access.
login.successRedirect: Authentication successful! Redirecting to the requested page.

signUp.title: Start reading with the community
signUp.subtitle: Takes less than a minute. Your library and progress are saved forever.
signUp.nameError: Tell us what to call you.
signUp.passwordError: Password must be at least 8 characters.
signUp.termsPrefix: I have read and accept the
signUp.termsError: You must accept the terms to continue.
signUp.createAccountError: Could not create account. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: No problem. Enter your registered e-mail and we'll send a reset link.
forgotPassword.emailHint: We'll send instructions to this address.
forgotPassword.sentSubtitle: If this account exists in Manga Reader, you'll receive a link to create a new password shortly.
forgotPassword.sentExpiry: The link expires in 30 minutes. Check your spam folder too.
forgotPassword.sentStep1: Open the e-mail with subject "Reset password"
forgotPassword.sentStep2: Click the button inside the message
forgotPassword.submittedMessage: If the email is registered, you will receive a link to reset your password. Check your inbox and spam folder.

resetPassword.invalidLinkSubtitle: This recovery link is not valid or has already expired. Request a new one.
resetPassword.validSubtitle: Create a strong password for your account.
resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.invalidLinkMessage: The password recovery link is invalid or has expired. Request a new link.

shell.communityTitle: Shared reading, the way it should be.
shell.communitySubtitle: Follow releases, build your library, join chapter forums and discover titles through community curation.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.acceptTermsAndDmca: You must accept the Terms of Use and the DMCA policy.
validation.fixErrors: Please fix the errors in the form.
validation.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
